We test three approaches on CIFAR-100: (1) Coarse-to-Fine: train on 2 super-classes, then expand to 10 specific sub-classes, (2) Fine-to-Coarse: train on 10 sub-classes, then group into 2 super-classes, and (3) Flat: train on all 10 classes from the start. We use Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) to prevent forgetting during transitions. Our hypothesis is that learning general patterns first creates a stable foundation that helps the model retain knowledge when learning more detailed distinctions. We evaluate using standard metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1) plus continual learning metrics like backward transfer and forgetting rates. This work could inform how we design learning sequences for real-world systems that need to learn incrementally.
papers.title_zh: 评估任务粒度对持续学习中灾难性遗忘的影响
papers.summary_zh: 灾难性遗忘，即学习新信息时先前获得的知识突然丢失，仍然是持续学习的核心挑战。该项目研究模型学习信息的顺序是否会影响其保留知识的能力。具体来说，我们问：与一次学习所有类别相比，在学习特定类别（例如“狗”与“猫”）之前先学习一般类别（例如“动物”与“车辆”）是否会减少遗忘？我们在 CIFAR-100 上测试了三种方法：(1) 从粗到细：在 2 个超类上进行训练，然后扩展到 10 个特定子类；(2) 从细到粗：在 10 个子类上进行训练，然后分为 2 个超类；(3) 平坦：从一开始就在所有 10 个类上进行训练。我们使用弹性权重合并（EWC）来防止过渡期间的遗忘。我们的假设是，学习一般模式首先创建一个稳定的基础，帮助模型在学习更详细的区别时保留知识。我们使用标准指标（准确率、精确度、召回率、F1）以及持续学习指标（例如向后迁移和遗忘率）进行评估。这项工作可以告诉我们如何为需要增量学习的现实系统设计学习序列。

papers.title: Aqua Boundary-Saliency Attention Module for Lightweight Underwater Salient Instance Segmentation Detection Transformer
papers.summary: Underwater instance segmentation integrates pixel-level mask prediction and instance-level discrimination for marine resource exploration, ecological monitoring, and underwater robotic perception. Recent prompt-based and auxiliary-modality methods improve mask quality, but their reliance on large foundation models, prompt generation, or extra modality estimation complicates efficient deployment. This work introduces Lightweight Underwater Salient Instance Segmentation Detection Transformer (LUSIS-DETR), a compact detection-transformer framework built around the Aqua Boundary-Saliency Attention Module (AquaBSAM). AquaBSAM embeds underwater boundary, contrast, attenuation, chroma, dark-channel, and center-prior cues into DINOv2-initialized multi-scale features through bounded residual modulation, while auxiliary mask supervision and small-object copy-paste are training-only. Extensive evaluation on four recent underwater instance segmentation datasets, UIIS, UIIS10K, USIS10K, and USIS16K, shows competitively leading performance against previous state-of-the-art works across category-aware and salient-instance protocols. TensorRT half-precision (FP16) benchmarking on an NVIDIA T4 graphics processing unit (GPU) achieves 4.31-6.34 milliseconds (ms) latency, supporting real-time inference under an accessible reproduction setting.
papers.comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
papers.title_zh: 用于轻量级水下显着实例分割检测 Transformer 的 Aqua 边界显着性注意模块
papers.summary_zh: 水下实例分割集成了像素级掩模预测和实例级区分，适用于海洋资源勘探、生态监测和水下机器人感知。最近的基于提示和辅助模态的方法提高了掩模质量，但它们对大型基础模型、提示生成或额外模态估计的依赖使高效部署变得复杂。这项工作介绍了轻量级水下显着性实例分割检测变压器（LUSIS-DETR），这是一个围绕 Aqua 边界显着性注意模块（AquaBSAM）构建的紧凑型检测变压器框架。 AquaBSAM 通过有界残差调制将水下边界、对比度、衰减、色度、暗通道和中心先验线索嵌入到 DINOv2 初始化的多尺度特征中，而辅助掩模监督和小对象复制粘贴仅用于训练。对最近的四个水下实例分割数据集 UIIS、UIS10K、USIS10K 和 USIS16K 进行的广泛评估表明，与之前跨类别感知和显着实例协议的最先进作品相比，其性能具有竞争优势。 NVIDIA T4 图形处理单元 (GPU) 上的 TensorRT 半精度 (FP16) 基准测试实现了 4.31-6.34 毫秒 (ms) 延迟，支持在可访问的再现设置下进行实时推理。

papers.title: Learning a Semantic Calibration Network for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.summary: Semantic image segmentation assigns a predefined category label to each pixel, has achieved significant progress lately. Open-Vocabulary Segmentation (OVS) extends the segmentation task from a fixed set to an open set, enabling the identification and segmentation of novel concepts based on arbitrary text inputs, such as category names or descriptions. In this paper, we propose a novel Semantic Calibration Network (SCN) for open-vocabulary semantic segmentation. Different from prior approaches that focus on feature aggregation or simple fine-tuning of pre-trained models, SCN refines the mask classification process by explicitly modeling the semantic correlations between classes, aiming to enhance the model's discriminative power while effectively preserving the generalization abilities of the pre-trained CLIP model. Specifically, SCN comprises two core components: Class Disambiguation (CD) and Logits Fusion (LF). First, a cross-attention mechanism is utilized to transform the text embeddings into visually aware pseudo-text embeddings, in order to derive an enhanced similarity score that complements the original mask-text similarity score. Subsequently, the Class Disambiguation module captures implicit inter-class dependencies through a residual architecture to effectively resolve semantic ambiguities. Finally, the Logits Fusion module dynamically integrates multifaceted semantic evidence to ensure that the model achieves a robust semantic consensus while maintaining CLIP's inherent generalization capability. Comprehensive experimental results on mainstream benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves significant performance improvements compared to state-of-the-art algorithms.
papers.comment: Paper accepted by 11th International Conference on Intelligent Computing and Signal Processing (ICSP 2026)
papers.title_zh: 学习用于开放词汇语义分割的语义校准网络
papers.summary_zh: 语义图像分割为每个像素分配预定义的类别标签，最近取得了重大进展。开放词汇分割 (OVS) 将分割任务从固定集扩展到开放集，从而能够基于任意文本输入（例如类别名称或描述）识别和分割新概念。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于开放词汇语义分割的新型语义校准网络（SCN）。与之前侧重于特征聚合或对预训练模型进行简单微调的方法不同，SCN 通过显式建模类之间的语义相关性来细化掩模分类过程，旨在增强模型的判别力，同时有效保留预训练 CLIP 模型的泛化能力。具体来说，SCN包含两个核心组件：类消歧（CD）和Logits Fusion（LF）。首先，利用交叉注意机制将文本嵌入转换为视觉感知的伪文本嵌入，以便导出增强的相似度分数来补充原始掩码文本相似度分数。随后，类消歧模块通过残差架构捕获隐式类间依赖关系，以有效解决语义歧义。最后，Logits Fusion模块动态集成多方面的语义证据，确保模型在保持CLIP固有的泛化能力的同时，实现稳健的语义共识。主流基准测试的综合实验结果表明，与最先进的算法相比，所提出的方法实现了显着的性能改进。

papers.title: Feasibility to detect rapid change and disappearance of seagrass: Lessons from nearly 80 years of vegetation change in the Ako, Seto Inland Sea, Japan
papers.summary: This study analyses the Ako tidal flat in the Seto Inland Sea, Japan, where nearly all Zostera marina disappeared within a single year in 2025. Using aerial photographs from the 1940s onward, high-resolution satellite imagery, GRUS images (2.5-5 m), and monthly Sentinel-2 composites (10 m), we reconstructed approximately 80 years of seagrass distribution. YOLO-based segmentation using deep learning achieved high accuracy (overall accuracy >= 0.9) across these datasets; although species could not be discriminated, the models captured the major temporal dynamics in vegetation area. The long-term mean seagrass area was 6.8 ha, but values fluctuated widely, from 3.5 ha in 1974 to 41.3 ha in 1989 except 0.2 ha in 2025. Sentinel-2 composites from 2019 to 2026 revealed clear seasonality, with vegetation increasing in early summer and declining from autumn. In 2025, however, the area decreased sharply after summer and remained anomalously low throughout the winter of 2025-2026. Our results, indicating that the 2025 event was not a normal fluctuation but a rapid ecosystem shift involving the loss of the dominant canopy-forming species, most plausibly driven by regionally elevated summer water temperatures. The findings also have implications for seagrass Essential Ocean Variables (EOVs) and the State of Nature (SoN) metrics used in TNFD-aligned nature-related disclosures. Unlike forests, seagrass meadows require finer temporal resolution because both pronounced seasonality and abrupt collapse strongly influence area-based indicators. Therefore, in addition to previously noted issues such as species-level classification accuracy, we recommend that (1) baselines be defined over the longest available record and justified ecologically, (2) seasonal standardization be applied before inter-annual comparisons, and (3) years with extreme area anomalies be flagged rather than used as reference points.
papers.title_zh: 检测海草快速变化和消失的可行性：日本濑户内海赤穗地区近 80 年植被变化的经验教训
papers.summary_zh: 这项研究分析了日本濑户内海的赤穗滩涂，那里几乎所有大叶藻码头在 2025 年的一年内就消失了。利用 2025 年以来的航空照片、高分辨率卫星图像、GRUS 图像 (2.5-5 m) 和月度 Sentinel-2 合成图像 (10 m)，我们重建了大约 80 年的海草分布。使用深度学习的基于 YOLO 的分割在这些数据集上实现了高精度（总体精度 >= 0.9）；尽管无法区分物种，但模型捕捉到了植被区域的主要时间动态。长期平均海草面积为 6.8 公顷，但数值波动较大，从 1974 年的 3.5 公顷到 1989 年的 41.3 公顷，2025 年为 0.2 公顷。2019 年至 2026 年的 Sentinel-2 合成数据显示出明显的季节性，植被在初夏增加，从秋季开始减少。然而，到了 2025 年，该面积在夏季之后急剧下降，并在 2025-2026 年整个冬季保持异常低水平。我们的结果表明，2025 年的事件不是正常的波动，而是生态系统的快速转变，涉及主要树冠形成物种的丧失，最有可能是由区域性夏季水温升高造成的。研究结果还对 TNFD 相关自然相关披露中使用的海草基本海洋变量 (EOV) 和自然状态 (SoN) 指标产生影响。与森林不同，海草草甸需要更精细的时间分辨率，因为明显的季节性和突然的塌陷都会强烈影响基于区域的指标。因此，除了之前提到的物种级分类准确性等问题外，我们建议（1）在最长的可用记录上定义基线并在生态上证明合理，（2）在年际比较之前应用季节标准化，（3）标记极端区域异常的年份而不是用作参考点。
